summary: The System Reference Document (SRD) contains D&D rules content, such as races, classes, and monsters, that is available for use and reference under the Creative Commons license. It serves as a foundation for third-party publishers to build their own products and adventures within the Dungeons & Dragons framework. While it includes a broad range of core mechanics and iconic creatures, it is designed as a resource for creators rather than a complete replication of every expansion book.
